admins.sendafter.reason: V2 INSERT INTO admins omits sendafter — scheduled admin sends not supported
admins.sendafter.notes: Fixed: added SendAfter to PostAdminRequest and included in INSERT. Test: TestPostAdminCreateWithSendAfter

ai_images.imagehash.reason: Written by V1 messages_illustrations.php cron (every 1 min). Fetches AI line drawings from Pollinations.ai and stores them. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

alerts.groupprogress.reason: groupprogress updated by alert-sending batch job, not V2 API

chat_messages.facebookid.reason: Facebook integration absent from V2 — facebookid intentionally omitted

chat_messages.spamscore.reason: Only set by V1 MailRouter during email ingestion (SpamAssassin check on incoming email). Go API never processes incoming email — not a V2 API gap.

chat_roster.lastmsgnotified.reason: V2 never updates lastmsgnotified in chat_roster — push notification dedup tracking absent
chat_roster.lastmsgnotified.notes: Fixed in iznik-batch ChatNotificationService: now updates both lastmsgemailed and lastmsgnotified

communityevents.externalid.reason: V2 INSERT INTO communityevents omits externalid — third-party event dedup broken
communityevents.externalid.notes: Written by V1 integration cron scripts (RepairCafeWales.php, RestartProject.php). Go web API creates user-submitted events; external ID is set by batch integrations only.

groups.welcomereview.reason: Written by V1 group_welcomereview.php cron (daily 01:00 and 15:00). Timestamps when welcome review was last processed per group. Not yet migrated to Laravel.

lovejunk.deletestatus.reason: Written by V1 lovejunk.php cron (every 1 min). Syncs edit/delete status with LoveJunk API. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

messages.envelopefrom.reason: V2 never nulls envelopefrom on message anonymization/withdrawal
messages.envelopefrom.notes: Fixed in Go handleForget(): UPDATE messages SET envelopefrom=NULL... WHERE fromuser=? (both partner and self-service flows). Test: TestForgetBlanksMessagePersonalData

messages.htmlbody.reason: V2 never nulls htmlbody on message anonymization/withdrawal
messages.htmlbody.notes: Fixed together with messages.envelopefrom in Go handleForget(). Test: TestForgetBlanksMessagePersonalData

messages.retrycount.reason: Laravel batch IncomingMailService has no recordFailure() equivalent. V1 MailRouter incremented retrycount on SpamAssassin/routing failures. Schema migration defines the column. Batch gap, not Go API gap.
messages.retrycount.notes: Fixed in iznik-batch IncomingMailService: added recordFailure() method

messages.retrylastfailure.reason: Same as retrycount — batch IncomingMailService never sets retrylastfailure on routing failure. Batch gap.
messages.retrylastfailure.notes: Fixed in iznik-batch IncomingMailService: added recordFailure() method

messages_edits.newimages.reason: V2 messages_edits does not record old/new items or images or location changes
messages_edits.newimages.notes: Fixed in Go PatchMessage: edit record now captures items/images/location changes. Test: TestMessageEditRecordsAllColumns

messages_edits.newitems.reason: V2 messages_edits does not record old/new items or images or location changes
messages_edits.newitems.notes: Fixed in Go PatchMessage: edit record now captures items/images/location changes. Test: TestMessageEditRecordsAllColumns

messages_edits.newlocation.notes: Fixed in Go PatchMessage: edit record now captures items/images/location changes. Test: TestMessageEditRecordsAllColumns

messages_edits.olditems.notes: Fixed in Go PatchMessage: edit record now captures items/images/location changes. Test: TestMessageEditRecordsAllColumns

messages_edits.oldlocation.notes: Fixed in Go PatchMessage: edit record now captures items/images/location changes. Test: TestMessageEditRecordsAllColumns

messages_groups.lastautopostwarning.notes: Written by V1 auto-repost cron (Message.php line 4719). Not a Go API write path.

messages_groups.lastchaseup.reason: Chaseup emails are a batch/cron job — lastchaseup written by batch, not V2 API

microactions.facebook_post.reason: Facebook integration not in V2 — facebook_post column intentionally absent

noticeboards.thanked.reason: V2 never writes thanked timestamp on noticeboards — thank-you tracking absent
noticeboards.thanked.notes: Set by donation thank flow (Noticeboard::thank()). Not a direct Go API gap — depends on donation-to-noticeboard thank feature not yet migrated.

trysts.ics1uid.reason: Written by V1 tryst.php cron (every 1 min). Tryst::sendCalendarsDue()/sendRemindersDue() sends ICS calendar invites and reminders. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

trysts.ics2uid.reason: Written by V1 tryst.php cron (every 1 min). Tryst::sendCalendarsDue()/sendRemindersDue() sends ICS calendar invites and reminders. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

trysts.icssent.reason: Written by V1 tryst.php cron (every 1 min). Tryst::sendCalendarsDue()/sendRemindersDue() sends ICS calendar invites and reminders. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

trysts.remindersent.reason: Written by V1 tryst.php cron (every 1 min). Tryst::sendCalendarsDue()/sendRemindersDue() sends ICS calendar invites and reminders. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

users.invitesleft.reason: No invitation system in V2 — invitesleft column never decremented. Consistent with users_invitations removal.

users.replyambit.reason: V2 has no geographic reply-ambit spam detection — replyambit never updated
users.replyambit.notes: Updated by V1 Spam.php during chat notification processing. Not a Go API write path — depends on complex geographic spam detection cron.

users_expected.expectee.reason: V2 never writes to users_expected — reply expectation tracking absent
users_expected.expectee.notes: Go chat send path should write users_expected (V1 ChatRoom.php:2344). Deferred — complex feature with spam/reply expectation tracking.

users_expected.expecter.reason: V2 never writes to users_expected — reply expectation tracking absent

users_modmails.logid.reason: V2 Go inserts to users_modmails without logid FK to logs table. Modmail count for member review still works. Lost: traceability from modmail record to the specific log entry that caused it.
users_modmails.logid.notes: users_modmails is written by V1 modmail send path (User.php:6454). Go API only reads it (count). Modmail sending not yet migrated to V2.

users_stories.mailedtocentral.reason: Story mailing is batch/newsletter — mailedtocentral written by batch, not V2 API

users_stories.mailedtomembers.reason: Story mailing is batch/newsletter — mailedtomembers written by batch, not V2 API

volunteering.externalid.reason: V2 volunteering INSERT does not include externalid column
volunteering.externalid.notes: Same as communityevents.externalid — written by external integration batch scripts, not the Go API web path.

admins_users.reason: Dedup table for bulk admin email sends — batch operation, not V2 API behaviour

groups_facebook_toshare.reason: Facebook integration not implemented in V2

jobs_keywords.reason: Table used only by batch/newsletter operations, not API

messages_ai_declined.reason: V2 has no record of user declining AI image — background job may re-add declined images
messages_ai_declined.notes: Go V2 has no AI service in web post path. Table is writable. AI decline via web is not implemented (email path handled by V1 cron). Test documents the gap: TestMessageAiDeclinedWritesTable

messages_deadlines.reason: FOP flag has zero references in Nuxt3 client — feature deliberately absent from V2 UI. messages:process-expired Laravel command exists but scheduler disabled. Deadline expiry still handled by V1 cron for any legacy messages with deadlines.

messages_history.reason: Laravel IncomingMailService writes messages_history for email-sourced messages, but V2 Go API never writes it for API-posted messages. Account-merge update (fromuser) also absent from both Laravel and V2.
messages_history.notes: Fixed in Go message.go JoinAndPost submit path: INSERT IGNORE INTO messages_history after messages_groups insert. Test: TestMessagePostWritesHistory

messages_isochrones.reason: Written by V1 message_spatial.php cron (every 5 min). Message::updateSpatialIndex() builds the isochrone for each message as replies come in, widening search radius. Not yet migrated to Laravel.

newsletters.reason: Table used only by batch/newsletter operations, not API

newsletters_articles.reason: Table used only by batch/newsletter operations, not API

returnpath_seedlist.reason: Email deliverability seed list — used by mail-sending batch, not V2 API

spam_countries.reason: Laravel SpamCheckService checks spam_countries for incoming email. V2 Go API does not check spam_countries at submission time — country-based blocking absent for API posts.
spam_countries.notes: Email path: covered by Laravel Batch SpamCheckService.checkIPCountry() which reads spam_countries + GeoIP. Web post path: spam from blocked countries goes to pending via existing Go spam check. Country block for web posts is a first-line optimisation, not a correctness requirement. REST GeoIP APIs are too slow (50-100ms) for request middleware; local MMDB would need a new infra dep in apiv2.

users_active.reason: Neither V2 Go API nor Laravel batch writes users_active. V1 recorded hourly activity for kudos/analytics. Laravel UpdateKudosCommand uses messages_outcomes instead, so kudos still works, but per-hour activity data is lost (analytics gap).
users_active.notes: Fixed in Go notification.List(): INSERT IGNORE INTO users_active with hourly timestamp. Test: TestNotificationListRecordsUsersActive

users_approxlocs.reason: Written by V1 nearby.php cron (daily 14:05). Nearby::updateLocations() blurs user positions for nearby-message notifications. Not yet migrated to Laravel. V1 cron still running.

users_dashboard.reason: V2 Go has a dashboard package that recomputes on each request — no caching table. V1 wrote computed results to users_dashboard for reuse. Performance difference only; dashboard functionality present in V2.

users_donations_asks.reason: Fully covered by Laravel AskDonationsCommand/DonationService — batch-only, not API behaviour

users_invitations.reason: No /invitation route in V2 — invitation feature appears deliberately removed. Flag: users_invitations table is never written; invite emails never sent from V2.

users_kudos.reason: No /kudos route in V2. Laravel UpdateKudosCommand writes users.kudos field instead. users_kudos detailed breakdown table appears deliberately deprecated — flag as architectural change.

users_nearby.reason: Written by V1 nearby.php cron (daily 14:05). Nearby::messages() tracks which users have been notified about which messages to avoid re-sending. Not yet migrated to Laravel.

users_stories_requested.reason: Story solicitation is a batch cron job — users_stories_requested is batch-only, not API
